title: campanula pusilla var. reflexa
intro: Campanula pusilla var. reflexa, also known as dwarf bellflower, is a rare and low-growing alpine plant species that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The medicinal properties of Campanula pusilla var. reflexa are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to promote overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful night's sleep.
